text:
Created attachment 235842
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr has been updated to 1.7.21.

Supported new model.

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
ET-2400 series
WF-2930 series
WF-2950 series
WF-2910 series
XP-3200 series
XP-2200 series
XP-4200 series

The build has been successful in the following environments in poudriere.
12.3-STABLE 1203507 amd64
